title: hymenophyllum peltatum
intro: Hymenophyllum peltatum, also known as the forked scale fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern native to tropical regions of Australia and Asia. The medicinal properties of Hymenophyllum peltatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds and skin infections. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
